creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 10:31:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits/tk80    Makefile 
    x11-toolkits/tk80/files patch-ab 
  Removed files:
    x11-toolkits/tk80    pkg-deinstall.wish pkg-install.wish 
  Log:
  - Adds TK80_MAN and WISH_WRAPPER to OPTIONS
  - Removes pseudo-installation of wish in favour of new lang/tcl-tk-wrapper port
  - Adds support for NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES knob
  - Uses USE_TCL from bsd.tcl.mk
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             110234
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.40      +17 -14    ports/x11-toolkits/tk80/Makefile
  1.6       +46 -11    ports/x11-toolkits/tk80/files/patch-ab
  1.2       +0 -22     ports/x11-toolkits/tk80/pkg-deinstall.wish (dead)
  1.4       +0 -32     ports/x11-toolkits/tk80/pkg-install.wish (dead)
